items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the last-touch/first-touch policy fields, but the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or data related to these fields. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga, such as booking activities and financial outputs, without addressing the specific need for last-touch/first-touch policy fields. Therefore, it is not possible to confirm whether the requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap.
